hero.title: Precision, by
hero.subtitle: Depth
hero.description: Software Engineer with +4 years of experience specialized in full-stack development — building a seamless blend of performance, security and aesthetics.

about.title: About
about.subtitle: What I bring to a team
about.description: I don't just write code — I solve problems. With a strong foundation in both frontend and backend, I bring a product-oriented mindset. I focus on building things that are fast, maintainable, and genuinely useful.

stats.title: Performance-First
stats.description: I care a lot about loading times and runtime efficiency. Every millisecond matters for giving your clients the best experience and staying competitive.

stats.title: Full-stack Depth
stats.description: From database design to pixel-perfect UIs. I bridge the gap between backend systems and frontend polish.

stats.title: Reliability at Scale
stats.description: Building systems that handle growth gracefully — through caching, security, project architectures, and thoughtful error handling.

stats.title: Clean Architecture
stats.description: Maintainable code isn't optional. I write systems that future engineers will thank me for.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Selected Work
projects.description: A few projects that showcase how I think — from problem identification to architecture decisions and trade-offs.

cards.title: Xalapa Móvil
desc: Built a mobile app for the Xalapa City Council to enhance citizen interaction'
Implemented features for submitting proposals, accessing services, and viewing local news
Centralized communication between residents and government entities
Improved accessibility and engagement with municipal services
cards.problem: Government needed a cross-platform mobile application to gather citizen proposals for city improvements and to expand the reach of website's services
cards.solution: Designed and developed a mobile application ready for running on Android and iOS
cards.key_decisions: Chose figma for wireframing screens and feature-based project architecture guaranteeing scalability over time

cards.title: Digital Signature
desc: Built a digital signature module for a clinical administrative system
Automated mass report generation for government compliance and validation
Reduced manual processing time and improved operational efficiency
Integrated doctor signatures directly into medical notes to streamline care workflows
Improved data integrity and ensured regulatory compliance
cards.problem: Managers were spending almost 1/3 of their working time manually signing and medical consultations were overlapping
cards.solution: Created a sub-module for HR system capturing employee's digital signature increasing productivity up to 90%
cards.key_decisions: Picked a symmetrical aes-256-cbc encrypt algorithm for keeping sensitive data safe and prevent stream manipulation and filtration

cards.title: Old Personal Website
desc: Built a personal portfolio platform to present my software engineering work
Created a cohesive experience combining technical and creative disciplines
Emphasized performance, responsive design, and modern UI/UX practices
cards.problem: There were no personal website for showcasing my professional path as software engineer, limitating growth and global presence
cards.solution: Developed a responsive website with optimized SEO and performance, based on trend designs
cards.key_decisions: Used Vite for a fast development experience due to CRA Webpack is deprecated and Framer Motion for smooth animations, prioritizing sections design.

cards.title: Human Resources System
desc: Engineered a microservice for an administrative clinical platform to manage HR operations
Implemented modules for attendance, incidents, permissions, vacations, and holidays
Designed a modular architecture with dedicated sub-modules for each HR function
Enhanced HR efficiency by centralizing and streamlining employee data management
cards.problem: Legacy HR system wasn't covering all current needs for incoming policies resulting in heavy workload
cards.solution: Gathered all requirements for making an intuitive system that boosted operational efficency
cards.key_decisions: Adopted a modular architecture to accommodate future policy changes and prioritized usability to ensure quick adoption

cards.title: Medical Congress Landing Page v2.0.0
desc: Led UI/UX redesign to enhance usability and modernize the interface
Implemented data management features
Created an admin dashboard for real-time access to participant information
cards.problem: v1 suffered from poor UI/UX, lack of automation, and absence of a structured database, resulting in inefficient manual processes and limited scalability
cards.solution: Re-architected the platform with a modernized UI/UX, integrated data management capabilities, and built an admin dashboard for real-time monitoring of participants
cards.key_decisions: Introduced a dedicated database for data consistency, focused on workflow automation to reduce manual overhead, and designed the system to support recurring large-scale events

cards.title: Tickets App
desc: Developed a real-time bank ticketing system using Socket.IO
Enabled bidirectional communication for live queue and ticket updates
Improved responsiveness and user interaction
cards.problem: Traditional ticketing and queue systems lack real-time updates, causing delays, poor synchronization, and inefficient user experience
cards.solution: Developed a real-time bank ticketing system using Socket.IO to enable bidirectional communication and instant queue updates
cards.key_decisions: WebSocket-based architecture for low-latency communication, designed event-driven interactions for real-time updates, and ensured synchronization between clients and server

cards.title: Resident Medical Evaluation System
desc: Engineered a microservice-based evaluation system for medical residents
Implemented modules for managing annual assessments and performance metrics
Streamlined evaluation workflows for the teaching department
Improved organization and accessibility of resident evaluation data
cards.problem: Manual and disconnected evaluation processes led to inefficiencies, lack of data consistency, and difficulty tracking resident performance over time
cards.solution: Design a centralized system to show metrics and streamline evaluation workflows improving workload efficiency by up to 65%
cards.key_decisions: Used a modular, scalable architecture to support recurring annual workflows with role based profile (admin, teacher, resident)

cards.title: Medical Congress Landing Page v1.0.0
desc: Built a web platform for hosting an annual medical congress since 2023
Developed attendee registration workflows
Provided internet presence through jornadasmedicascae.com domain
cards.problem: Assistants were required to register in person due to the absence of a digital platform, limiting attendance and reducing event reach
cards.solution: Designed a landing page for online registration increasing reach and growth by 72%
cards.key_decisions: Used React as UI Library for mantaining uniformity against hospital's systems along an enterprise Google Workspace solution for professional email presence and AWS hosting

cards.title: Heroes App
desc: Built a React-based web application with client-side state management using Context API and reducers
Implemented authentication flow with protected public/private routes
Leveraged localStorage for persistence of user session, theme (dark mode), and navigation state
Developed dynamic search functionality with real-time input handling and keyboard events
cards.problem: Managing client-side state, persistence, and route protection without a backend required a structured frontend architecture
cards.solution: Developed a React-based web app using Context API and reducers for state management, with localStorage to persist user data such as login status, theme, and navigation history

cards.title: Currency Converter Challenge
desc: Developed a currency converter application as part of the Oracle Next Education Program
Integrated an external Exchange Rate API to fetch real-time currency values
Built a graphical user interface using Java Swing for an intuitive user experience
Implemented dynamic currency conversion based on user input and API data
cards.problem: Users needed a simple way to access up-to-date currency exchange rates without manually searching or calculating values
cards.solution: Developed a desktop application that integrates with an Exchange Rate API to fetch real-time currency data and perform dynamic conversions
cards.key_decisions: Implemented API integration from scratch to handle real-time data retrieval, used Java Swing for a lightweight desktop interface, and designed input-driven conversion logic for immediate user feedback

cards.title: Cipher Challenge
desc: Built a web app for text encryption and decryption as part of the Oracle Next Education Program
Implemented custom encoding/decoding algorithms for string manipulation
Designed a simple and intuitive UI for user interaction
Handled input validation and real-time text processing
cards.problem: Project needed a simple way to encode and decode text based on predefined rules without performing manual transformations
cards.solution: Developed a web application that implements text encryption and decryption using custom encoding/decoding algorithms with real-time processing
cards.key_decisions: Implemented custom string manipulation logic to meet specific encoding rules, prioritized a trend UI for usability, and added real-time input handling for immediate feedback

cards.title: MP3 Glass Player
desc: Built a custom MP3 web player with a glassmorphism design system
Implemented interactive audio controls and dynamic UI states
Designed a responsive and visually engaging interface with modern UI trends
Enhanced user experience through smooth interactions and clean visual hierarchy
cards.problem: Traditional web audio players often lack modern UI design and engaging user experience
cards.solution: Designed and developed an MP3 web player with a clean glassmorphism-inspired interface, focusing on aesthetics and usability
cards.key_decisions: Adopted a glassmorphism design system for a modern look and feel, prioritized intuitive playback controls, and ensured smooth user interaction through responsive UI design

cards.title: Lotus Discord Bot
desc: Built a Discord music bot using Node.js with support for YouTube and Spotify integration
Implemented real-time command handling and audio streaming within Discord voice channels
Customized the bot experience with a Warframe-based game interface and responses
cards.problem: Existing solutions for music playback in Discord were limited or lacked flexibility across multiple streaming platforms
cards.solution: Built a Node.js Discord bot for YouTube and Spotify playback
cards.key_decisions: API integrations for multiple audio sources, designed a command-driven interface for usability, and structured real-time interaction within Discord voice channels

skills.title: Skills
skills.subtitle: Technical depth
skills.description: Technologies I've worked with, grouped by domain. I value depth over breadth — I'd generally rather master a few tools than skim many but, at the same time, I strive to stay current with emerging technologies.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Let's build something great
contact.description: I'm open to full-time roles, contract work, and interesting collaborations. Working remotely worldwide. If you're looking for an engineer who cares about quality.
